patch.value: Phase 2 tracks event and recurrence parity expansion with compatibility safeguards and full regression coverage.
Calendar parity phase 2: events and recurrence
Expand calendar from reminders/deadlines into full event and recurrence capabilities while preserving deterministic and agent-safe behavior.
Calendar supports first-class events and recurring events with deterministic rendering, safe mutation paths, and release-grade test/docs coverage.
